items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for user-owned calendar connections and event feeds. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm the existence or functionality of these calendar connections and event feeds. The linked use case mentions the need for user-owned calendar connections, but there is no direct evidence supporting this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
